feed.title: BioDataHub - Bioinformatics VS Code Extension
feed.subtitle: Updates and news from BioDataHub
feed.rights: Copyright © 2026 Mubashir Ali. All rights reserved.

entry.title: BioDataHub 1.5.0 Released
entry.summary: Latest version of BioDataHub with enhanced features and performance improvements.

entry.title: BioBuntu v1.2.4 Released
entry.summary: Release 1.2.4: stability, packaging and expanded workflow support.

div.p: BioBuntu v1.2.4 is available. Highlights include improved project management, better pipeline dependency handling, and packaging updates (.deb, PPA, Conda).
Install via PyPI: pip install biobuntu==1.2.4
Read the full release notes at BioBuntu v1.2.4 Released.

entry.title: BioBuntu v0.1 Released
entry.summary: BioBuntu v0.1 is available with core features for reproducible bioinformatics workflows.

div.p: BioBuntu v0.1 is available. This release includes core features for reproducible pipelines and improved UX.
Read more at BioBuntu v0.1 Released.

entry.title: Hello World — BioBuntu launch notes
entry.summary: Announcing the BioBuntu project and goals for accessible bioinformatics tooling.

div.p: Welcome to BioBuntu. This post explains the project's goals to make bioinformatics more accessible.
Read more at Hello World — BioBuntu launch notes.

entry.title: New Documentation Site Launched
entry.summary: Comprehensive documentation for BioDataHub is now available.

div.p: We've launched a complete documentation site with tutorials, guides, and API references. Visit docs to get started.
